scripts.dev: concurrently -i -n web,api -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @devplanner/web" "npm run dev -w @devplanner/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @devplanner/api && npm run build -w @devplanner/web
scripts.db:vector: docker compose exec -T devplanner-db psql -U devplanner -d devplanner -c "CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;"
scripts.docker:infra: docker compose up -d devplanner-db devplanner-redis radicale
